headline: 今日AI速览：学术研究最活跃
narrative:
今日共收录277篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究191篇, 开源项目44篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API12篇。热门标签：Agent（67篇）。其中10%的文章有多来源交叉验证。

▸ Nutlope /hallmark：Anti-AI-slop design skill for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.

▸ mattpocock /skills：Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.

▸ moeru-ai /airi：💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them

▸ Dicklesworthstone /destructive_command_guard：The Destructive Command Guard (dcg) is for blocking dangerous git and shell commands from being exec

▸ HKUDS /Vibe-Trading："Vibe-Trading: Your Personal Trading Agent"
text: 今日共收录277篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究191篇, 开源项目44篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API12篇。热门标签：Agent（67篇）。其中10%的文章有多来源交叉验证。
